Hi, I'm Anurag

Front-End Developer.

A self-taught front-end developer with over 2 months of experience, I build responsive and user-friendly websites & apps. I focus on clean code and efficient design, ensuring seamless interactions that align with both user expectations and business objectives.

Technical Stack

An Orbiting Ecosystem of Modern Technologies

I leverage a modular stack to engineer performant, responsive web apps. With standard-compliant layouts, smooth UI flows, and hardware-accelerated animations, I transform complex requirements into clean frontend architecture.

Innovative Interactive Work

Combining creative frontend engineering with robust 3D interactive visualizations.

3D WebGL Scanner

AuthX Cyber Scanner Suite

A high-fidelity cybersecurity monitoring interface featuring real-time interactive coordinate scanning lasers and data visualization sweeps designed with custom shaders.

Reactive Soundwave

AI Soundwave Chatbot

An interactive voice chatbot integration visualizer featuring dynamic soundwaves that scale and color-shift responsively according to streaming audio volume levels and user interactions.
